description: Comprehensive security controls for regulated industries and disconnected environments, from encryption to credential management.

features.title: TLS/SSL Management
features.desc: Automated certificate provisioning and renewals for all database connections with zero manual intervention.

features.title: Transparent Data Encryption (TDE)
features.desc: Encrypted storage at rest via cloud provider key management services ensuring data security.

features.title: Network Isolation
features.desc: Database pods run inside Kubernetes private pod network by default; configurable network policies restrict communication to authorized pods only.

features.title: RBAC Resource-Level Permissions
features.desc: Control which users and groups can act on specific database instances (e.g., developers on Dev, only DBAs on Prod).

features.title: Private Registry & Air-Gapped Support
features.desc: Runs fully offline with no internet access required; suitable for sovereign and regulated environments.

features.title: Database User Management
features.desc: Vault integration for dynamic credential generation, custom permissions, and automated credential rotation.
